Bandwidth.com CLEC, LLC is a wholly owned subsidiary of Bandwidth Inc. ©2026
Cookie Preference Center
Bandwidth and our partners use cookies, pixels, and similar tracking technology tools (“Cookies”) to gather information about you, your device, and how you interact with our website. Some Cookies are necessary for the website to function and are always enabled. Other Cookies are “optional,” including Cookies used to provide enhanced functionality and personalization, monitor the performance of our site, and evaluate and improve advertising. You can choose to disable some types of Cookies on your device by indicating your preferences to us below. Click on the category headings to find more information about our purposes for using each category of Cookies and use the toggles to change our default settings to reflect your preferences. Please note that disabling some types of Cookies may affect the functionality of and your experience on our websites.
Although we do not “sell” information collected via Cookies for money, we engage in routine online activities (such as targeted or cross-contextual behavioral advertising) with third parties in ways that could be considered a “sale” or “sharing” as defined under the California Consumer Privacy Act. You can opt out of such disclosures by disabling the “Targeting Cookies” toggle below by moving the white circle to the left so that it displays a gray bar and clicking “Confirm Selections” below.
For more information, see our
Privacy Notice
.
Accept all
Manage cookie preferences
Strictly Necessary Cookies
Always Active
These Cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are frequently only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services from you, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms. You can set your browser to block or alert you about these Cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work.
Cookies Details
Targeting Cookies
Targeting Cookies
These Cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by these companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites from us and other parties. They generally do not collect identifying information such as name, but are based on uniquely identifying your browser and device. [Please note that even if you opt out of Targeting Cookies you may still see our ads on other websites, applications, and online services, and we may still base aspects of our advertising on your interactions with us and our websites.]
Cookies Details
Functional Cookies
Functional Cookies
These Cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality, including detecting bots and maintaining security on the website. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages. If you do not allow these Cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.
Cookies Details
Performance Cookies
Performance Cookies
These Cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. For example, they help us to know which pages and features are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site. If you do not allow these Cookies we may not be able to monitor and address performance issues on the website.

analysis.name: Bandwidth
analysis.value_proposition: Direct-to-carrier global communications platform providing voice, messaging, emergency, and authentication APIs plus enterprise UCaaS/CCaaS integrations on an owned-and-operated network.
analysis.ideal_customer: Global 2000 enterprises, SaaS product builders, voice AI startups, and communications providers needing high-volume, direct-to-carrier voice/messaging with enterprise integrations

features.name: voice api
features.description: Programmable voice calling API with 6-second billing increments on all-IP network
features.evidence_quote: Embed flexible, scalable voice calling into your application with 6-second billing increments

features.name: messaging api
features.description: All-in-one messaging API supporting SMS, MMS, RCS with global reach
features.evidence_quote: Messaging API (All in one) SMS MMS RCS

features.name: rcs messaging
features.description: Rich Communication Services for enriched messaging

features.name: alphanumeric sender id
features.description: Alphanumeric sender ID for global messaging
features.evidence_quote: 10DLC, Short Code, Toll-free, Alphanumeric, and Global Mobile Number texting

features.name: global mobile number texting
features.evidence_quote: Alphanumeric, and Global Mobile Number texting

features.name: authentication api
features.evidence_quote: Secure your software, website, or application user accounts with multi-factor authentication

features.name: call verification
features.description: Branded call verification to prevent spoofing

features.name: number reputation management
features.description: Manage phone number reputation to reduce call blocking

features.name: in-app calling
features.description: Voice calling embedded in mobile/web apps

features.name: text-to-speech
features.description: Standard and enhanced TTS for voice apps

features.name: global sip trunking
features.description: All-IP SIP trunking service with global reach
features.evidence_quote: Consolidate and save with all-IP, flexible SIP trunking services

features.name: phone number provisioning
features.description: Phone number search, order, and management

features.name: voice and messaging insights
features.description: Analytics and deliverability insights across voice/messaging

features.name: microsoft teams direct routing
features.description: Direct routing integration for Microsoft Teams calling

features.name: microsoft teams operator connect
features.description: Operator Connect integration for Teams Phone

features.name: webex calling integration
features.description: BYOC integration for Cisco Webex Calling

features.name: google voice sip link
features.description: SIP Link integration for Google Voice

features.name: conversational ai integrations
features.description: Connect voice to conversational AI platforms
features.evidence_quote: Conversational AI with easy connectivity into your CCaaS

features.name: bring your own ai
features.description: Connect any AI platform to voice infrastructure

features.name: bandwidth maestro
features.evidence_quote: Take command of your communications with Bandwidth Maestro™

features.name: universal platform
features.description: Unified insights, numbers, and APIs on one global platform
features.evidence_quote: The next level of communications with insights, numbers, and APIs all on one global platform

features.name: contact center security & trust
features.description: Trust services for contact centers including number reputation

features.name: customer success plans
features.description: Tiered support with >99% SLA response rate
features.evidence_quote: Our cross-functional experts hit a >99% SLA response rate for all support tickets

features.name: api reference
features.evidence_quote: Guides API Reference Developer Tools Samples

features.name: network status page
features.description: Real-time network status and incident reporting

features.name: volume-based pricing
features.description: High-volume discounts and committed use pricing

features.name: 6-second billing increments
features.evidence_quote: voice calling into your application with 6-second billing increments

differentiators: 93% of global economy covered, 65+ countries PSTN
>99% SLA response rate on support tickets

praised: 'The amount of time we have spent on outage calls has significantly decreased' — Wyndham
'deliver those calls at a high quality...very consistent results' — Pennymac
'make it easier for us to do what we do best' — Attentive

tiers.name: SIP Trunking
tiers.headline_inclusions: Custom usage-based quote for voice, emergency, phone numbers

tiers.name: BYOC Integrations
tiers.headline_inclusions: Custom pricing for Teams, Webex, Zoom, Genesys, Five9, Google Voice

pricing.notes: Usage-based direct-to-carrier pricing across all products; no free tier; committed-use and high-volume discounts available; SIP trunking and BYOC integrations require custom quote; rates exclude taxes/fees; full product pricing on request
